title: Nucleic acid precipitation
steps: Bring volume of reaction/nucleic acid mixture to 200µL with sterile, clean water
Add 20µL of 3M sodium acetate (NaOAc), 1µL glycogen, and 550µL ethanol (99%).
Place in -20°C freezer for approximately 30-60 minutes or store there indefinitely.
Spin samples at 4°C, 13000 RPM for 20 minutes.
Decant liquid, careful not to disturb pellet.
Add 300µL of 70% ethanol to wash the pellet. Dislodge the pellet with ethanol streaming.
Spin as in step 4 but only for 10 minutes.
Carefully aspirate liquid, careful not to suck up the pellet.
Allow pellet to air dry completely. Can set in a rock on top of 65°C heat block.
creator: Eadewunm
